input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.6.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.6.3
            TITLE: when rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6.3: When rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles:
T.7.6.3 When rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles: 
In the Rear Aerodynamic Zone

final_answer: When rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles: In the Rear Aerodynamic Zone
